posts.author: Empireconstruction (Ricky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to know if there is any implementation expert that can help our general construction company to implement our Monday system correctly? We need to have project management system, internal finance system and task/deflect manage system.

Thanks
Ricky

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Empireconstruction ,

We would be happy to have an initial chat and see if we’re a good fit to work together.

Feel free to drop us an email at teameasy@easy-mondays.com so we can connect.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Empireconstruction There’s also a matching service where you can explain your challenge and the monday team will provide you a shortlist of experts. monday experts
